results.title: Sokoto govt reaffirms commitment to establish family health department
results.description: The Sokoto State government has reaffirmed its commitment to the establishment of a family health department aimed at strengthening maternal and child healthcare services in the state. This was made known on Wednesday during an advocacy visit by the Special Adviser to the President on Health, Dr Salma Anas, to the Honourable Commissioner for Health, [...] The post Sokoto govt reaffirms commitment to establish family health department appeared first on Tribune Online .

results.title: Yara CEO: Strait of Hormuz disruption has had global implications for fertiliser exports
results.description: Svein Tore Holsether, CEO of Yara, discusses the disruption caused by the Middle East crisis as the company releases their Q2 earnings.
